title: Select All The True Statements About Bloodborne Pathogens
source_filename: Select All The True Statements About Bloodborne Pathogens.docx

qas.q: How should you best protect yourself from illness caused by bloodborne pathogens?
qas.a: Hand washing. Hepatitis B vaccintation. Use personal protective equipment.

qas.q: Washing hands and skin after exposure
qas.a: Is done with soap and large amounts of water

qas.q: You have cleaned up a blood spill and have removed your gloves. To protect yourself you should also
qas.a: Wash your hands immediately with soap and large amount of water

qas.q: What should an employee do after exposure to blood?
qas.a: Report the incident to the person designated by the company as soon as possible
How to act if an exposure to a bloodborne pathogen occurs.

qas.q: Choose all the statements that are true about blood borne pathogens
qas.a:
You will become sick only if enough of the pathogen enters your body.
You will become sick only if your body is at risk for getting the illness.

qas.q: The main ways bloodborne pathogens can enter the body and make you sick include
qas.a: Getting stuck with a sharp object that has blood on it.
